title: LEGO Star Wars 75425 SMART Play: Mos Eisley Cantina - Compatible Interactive Toy Set incl. 3 SMART Tags and 2 Minifigures - Gift Idea for 8+ Year Old Boys, Girls & Adult Fans
features: INTERACTIVE STAR WARS BUILDING TOY – This LEGO SMART Play Compatible set features a Mos Eisley Cantina model with 2 SMART Tags, a stage, seating area with ejector seats, and a bar, plus a Dewback with a SMART Tag and 2 SMART Minifigures
THE GALAXY PLAYS BACK – When connected to 1 of the 3 SMART Tags, a LEGO SMART Brick (not included) powers up interactive music and singing, drink-mixer sounds, and Dewback walking and sleeping noises

2 LEGO SMART STAR WARS MINIFIGURES – Bring SMART Obi-Wan Kenobi and SMART Greedo minifigures to life with a SMART Brick (not included) for responsive play by revealing their unique voices and reactions

HOW TO ACTIVATE YOUR SET – A LEGO SMART Brick from an All-in-One set 75421, 75423 or 75427 (sold separately) is required to enable immersive play functions (please note, the SMART Brick is not available to purchase as a stand-alone product)
SCREEN-FREE PLAYTIME – Join friends and family to recreate iconic scenes: role-play the moment Obi-Wan Kenobi arrives at the cantina as the band play on stage and drinks are made at the bar
STAR WARS GIFT FOR KIDS – Treat a fan to this interactive building toy, which makes an out-of-this-world birthday gift idea for 8+ year old boys and girls, as well as teenage or adult collectors
DIGITAL INSTRUCTIONS – The LEGO Builder app guides your child on an intuitive adventure that lets them zoom in and rotate sets using 3D instructions, as well as save and track their progress
description: From the manufacturer Gift idea for kids Recreate Star Wars: A New Hope scenes Enjoy fun times at Mos Eisley Cantina with this LEGO Star Wars SMART Play Compatible Set for kids. The detailed brick-built model of the famous cantina divides into 4 modules for easy play and makes for cool room decor. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. SMART Play combo Match with 75423 SMART Play: Luke’s Red Five X-Wing for interactive play. Next page
